sentences.arabic: الْإِخْلَاصُ فِي الْعَمَلِ هُوَ أَسَاسُ قَبُولِ الطَّاعَةِ عِنْدَ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost u djelima je osnova za prihvatanje pokornosti kod Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity in action is the foundation for the acceptance of obedience by Allah.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: "إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى" [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama, i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je nanijetio" [Bilježi el-Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (PBUH) said: 'Actions are but by intentions, and every man shall have only what he intended' [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَبْتَغِيَ بِقَوْلِهِ وَفِعْلِهِ وَجْهَ اللهِ تَعَالَى فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora svojim riječima i postupcima tražiti samo Allahovo zadovoljstvo.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must seek only the sake of Allah Almighty through his words and deeds.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا كَانَتِ النِّيَّةُ صَالِحَةً، بَارَكَ اللهُ فِي الْعَمَلِ الْقَلِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Ako je namjera ispravna, Allah blagoslovi i malo djelo.
sentences.translationEn: If the intention is righteous, Allah blesses even a small deed.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، نَحْنُ نُصَحِّحُ نِيَّاتِنَا قَبْلَ كُلِّ عِبَادَةٍ لِنَنَالَ الثَّوَابَ.
sentences.translation: Zato popravljamo svoje namjere prije svakog ibadeta kako bismo stekli nagradu.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we correct our intentions before every act of worship to attain the reward.
